steps.title: Spot the structural requirement
steps.content: The blank precedes “112th in a global ranking,” which cannot form a complete sentence without a subject and verb. The constitution is singular.

steps.title: Select the choice that completes the sentence
steps.content: 'It's' (it is) makes the sentence complete: it is “112th in a global ranking.” The possessive forms 'its' and 'their' lack the verb needed, while 'they're' uses the wrong number. That matches choice C — C is correct.
